fix(ved): Fix container files and number field overflow on mobile

## User Request (Original)
В контейнере файлы не влезают полностью в мобильной версии, не отображаются 4 иконки (скачать, просмотр, редактировать, удалить). Также номер контейнера выходит за блок.

## Actions Taken
- Moved .ved-file-item styles from inline to CSS class with proper flex layout
- Added .ved-file-actions wrapper for action buttons with flex-shrink: 0
- Added mobile responsive styles: flex-wrap on file items, full-width actions row
- Changed files list from flex-wrap row to flex-direction column layout
- Fixed container number field: flex: 0 0 220px → flex: 1 1 180px with min-width and flex-wrap on parent

## Files Changed
- `ozon_app.py` - CSS styles, mobile media query, createFileElement() JS function, container form HTML

commit.message:
fix: Overpass query split, black gap elimination, works forecast repositioned

- Split Overpass API query into separate node + way queries with `out center;`
  to prevent timeout (was recursively fetching millions of nodes)
- Fixed black gaps: removed `height: 100%` from `.reveal` CSS, adjusted
  IntersectionObserver to trigger 120px before viewport with 2% threshold
- Moved works forecast chart below list/pagination (was too high between
  hourly strip and map)
- Reduced section padding across 20+ sections for tighter layout
- Truncated corridor clashes to 6 visible + accordion for remaining

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

[Sprint 3] Bank integration - Ponto sync + transaction matching

- NixFact Bank Koppeling DocType (ING/Rabo/ABN/Bunq, Ponto credentials)
- NixFact Bank Transactie DocType (Dynamic Link matching, confidence score)
- Ponto API integration (OAuth2, transaction fetch + parse + import)
- 3-tier matching engine: invoice number extraction (100%), amount+customer+date (90-95%), fuzzy name (60-80%)
- Auto-afletteren at >= 95% confidence
- API endpoint: sync_ponto_transactions (import + match in one call)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use live return (including sold+dividends) for notification rules

The old rules compared currentValueGBP directly to totalBought, which
includes shares already sold. This caused false loss alerts for every
position where sold amount inflated totalBought above currentValueGBP.

Now both rules use the correct return formula:
  return = currentValueGBP + totalSold + totalDividends - totalBought

- Profit alert: return > £1
- Loss alert: return < 0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add: Configuracao completa Docker + Redis para dev e producao

RESUMO:
- Suporte completo para Docker Desktop (desenvolvimento)
- Suporte completo para Redis Cloud (desenvolvimento + producao)
- Configuracoes de producao com Docker Compose
- Documentacao detalhada de deployment
- Scripts de teste para Redis Cloud

ARQUIVOS ADICIONADOS:

1. docker-compose.yml (Desenvolvimento)
   - Redis 7-alpine
   - Porta 6379
   - Volume persistente
   - Health checks configurados
   - Restart automatico

2. docker-compose.prod.yml (Producao)
   - Redis com configuracao customizada
   - Servico de notificacoes integrado
   - Network isolada
   - Configuracao de environment variables
   - Alta disponibilidade

3. Dockerfile (Container do Servico)
   - Python 3.12-slim
   - Non-root user (seguranca)
   - Health checks
   - Otimizado para producao
   - Multi-stage build support

4. redis.conf (Configuracao Producao)
   - Seguranca: requirepass, protected-mode
   - Persistencia: RDB (snapshot) + AOF (append-only file)
   - Performance: maxmemory 256mb, allkeys-lru
   - Logging configurado
   - Buffer limits otimizados

5. .dockerignore
   - Exclui arquivos desnecessarios do build
   - Reduz tamanho da imagem
   - Build mais rapido

DOCUMENTACAO:

6. DEPLOYMENT_GUIDE.md (34KB)
   - Guia completo de deployment
   - Desenvolvimento: Docker Desktop, WSL2, Memurai, Redis Cloud
   - Producao: Redis Cloud, Docker em VPS, AWS ElastiCache, Azure Redis
   - Monitoramento e troubleshooting
   - Seguranca e escalabilidade
   - Checklist de producao

7. REDIS_QUICK_START.md (5.4KB)
   - Inicio rapido em 3 minutos
   - Recomendacoes diretas
   - Comandos uteis
   - Comparacao de opcoes
   - Setup passo a passo

8. REDIS_CLOUD_SETUP.md (14KB)
   - Tutorial completo Redis Cloud
   - Passo a passo com screenshots
   - Configuracao de seguranca
   - Teste de conexao
   - Monitoramento e alertas
   - Planos e upgrade
   - Troubleshooting detalhado

SCRIPTS:

9. test_redis_cloud.py
   - Teste completo de conexao
   - Valida credenciais
   - Testa PING, SET/GET, Pub/Sub
   - Mostra info do servidor
   - Tratamento de erros detalhado

OPCOES DISPONIVEIS:

DESENVOLVIMENTO:
- Opcao 1: Docker Desktop (recomendado)
  * Um comando: docker-compose up -d
  * Mesmo ambiente de producao
  * Dados persistem

- Opcao 2: Redis Cloud (30MB gratis)
  * Zero instalacao local
  * Pronto para producao
  * Backups automaticos

PRODUCAO:
- Opcao 1: Redis Cloud (recomendado)
  * $0 (30MB) -> $5/mes (1GB)
  * Alta disponibilidade
  * Zero manutencao

- Opcao 2: Docker em VPS
  * DigitalOcean, AWS, Hetzner
  * Controle total
  * Custo $5-20/mes

COMANDOS RAPIDOS:

# Docker Local
docker-compose up -d              # Iniciar
docker-compose down               # Parar
docker-compose logs -f redis      # Ver logs

# Redis Cloud
python test_redis_cloud.py        # Testar conexao

# Producao
docker-compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml up -d --build

PROXIMOS PASSOS:
1. Instalar Docker Desktop OU configurar Redis Cloud
2. Testar conexao
3. Iniciar servico: python main.py
4. Verificar integracao com SST Finder

from the previous week.

commit.message:
feat: unify three disagreeing dossier parsers (#81) (#115)

* feat: unify three dossier parsers into single source of truth

Consolidate parsing from core (JSON-only), CLI (inline YAML), and
registry (gray-matter) into @ai-dossier/core using gray-matter.

- Core parser now supports both ---dossier (JSON/YAML) and --- (YAML)
- Single required fields: dossier_schema_version, title, version
- Status enum: Title Case with Experimental, case-insensitive validation
- CLI imports parser and validation constants from core
- Registry imports parser from core, removes gray-matter direct dep
- Add registry to monorepo workspaces
- Export REQUIRED_FIELDS, VALID_STATUSES, VALID_RISK_LEVELS from core

Closes #81

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address self-review findings

- Remove inline YAML fallback parsers from info.ts and run.ts
  (core now handles both formats)
- Fix ---dossier normalization to strip trailing text on first line
  (prevents gray-matter engine name misinterpretation)
- Remove dead imports in registry/lib/dossier.js

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: use Title Case for VALID_STATUSES, fix registry Vercel deploy

- VALID_STATUSES now uses Title Case ('Draft', 'Stable', 'Deprecated',
  'Experimental') matching the DossierStatus type and JSON schema
- CLI validate/publish commands use case-insensitive comparison
- Registry keeps gray-matter as direct dep (Vercel can't use workspace
  core which isn't published with gray-matter yet)
- MCP server uses core's parseDossierContent instead of local regex

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
fix(nginx): route /api/* to Laravel instead of static file handler

The static asset regex `location ~* \.(js|css|...)` was intercepting
`/api/widget/{token}.js` and returning 404 because no static file exists.
Added `location ^~ /api/` with higher priority to ensure all API routes
reach PHP-FPM.

commit.message:
feat: pipeline orchestrator agent

Subagents cannot spawn subagents — pipeline must be driven from
main context. New `pipeline` agent is the orchestrator:

- Scans SPEC_INDEX for ready/review REQs
- Invokes team-lead for implementation
- Drives verification: direction-reviewer → code-reviewer → acceptance
- Handles PASS/FAIL routing with max 3 retries per stage
- On acceptance PASS: gh pr ready + notify user to merge

Review agents now return PASS/FAIL to orchestrator instead of
invoking next agent directly (which was impossible anyway).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Explain why images bypass MCP in README

Adds context on the dual-write pattern: saving directly to vault and
passing via --add-dir avoids base64-encoding images into Claude's
context window.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: make with_preview_height() actually use the parameter (#64)

was a no-op (hardcoded session_list_width_pct = 35). Now clamps
the input to 10..90 and sets both width and height percentages
so the preview panel respects the configured size.

fix: show BTC tx link + honest wait message during Garden confirmation delay

Garden Finance's BTC indexer can take up to 15 minutes after the first
block confirmation to update the order status. Previously the UI showed
'Bitcoin network confirming...' which implies the BTC hasn't confirmed yet
— misleading when the tx is already in a block.

Now shows: mempool.space link to the BTC tx + 'Waiting for Garden Finance
to detect the confirmation. This can take up to 15 minutes — keep this
tab open.'

commit.message:
Port full NIST visual similarity algorithm to TypeScript

Replaces our approximate Levenshtein+confusables implementation with an
accurate port of the official NIST gTLD visual similarity algorithm
(Paul E. Black, NIST May 2008 — US Government work, public domain).

confusables.ts:
- Full 60-pair character similarity table (was ~20 pairs)
- Full 7-entry digraph similarity table (rn→m, vv→w, cl→d, nn→m, etc.)
- Added getDigraphSimilarity() lookup helper

similarity.ts:
- nistLevenshtein(): enhanced DP with fractional substitution costs,
  digraph 2→1 / 1→2 / 2→2 substitutions, repetition-aware insert/delete
  costs, and Damerau-style transposition weighted by character similarity
- howConfusableAre() normalisation: NIST formula
  (maxLen - D) / (maxLen + 3·D + |lenDiff|·D) — penalises length
  differences more aggressively than plain (1 - D/maxLen)
- Removed normalizeConfusables() pre-processing (now handled natively
  by the digraph table and character similarity costs)

Our similarity scores now closely match what ICANN evaluators see when
they run strings through the NIST tool.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Etap 2: hamster drawing + WASD movement + HUD

- _draw_hamster(): full port of drawHamster() from HTML (body/head/ears/eyes/whiskers/feet)
- _ell(): helper for filled rotated ellipses via draw_colored_polygon
- _ca(): color helper with alpha modulation (for burrowed state)
- Movement: immediate on keydown + repeat on hold (8-frame interval)
- Enter: restart (regenerate maze, reset hamster)
- HUD: burrow icons, position debug, controls hint

commit.message:
refactor(cli): replace on/off/mute with notify/speak/voice (#69)

* refactor(cli): replace on/off/mute with notify/speak/voice commands

Aligns CLI with the standard that every slash command has a
corresponding CLI command. Slash commands now delegate to the CLI
via Bash instead of manually editing .vox/config.md.

- `vox notify y|n|c` replaces `vox on` / `vox off` (adds c mode)
- `vox speak y|n` replaces `vox mute` (adds the missing inverse)
- `vox voice <name>` is new (fills /unmute @name gap)
- `vox notify c` always enables speak (continuous = spoken)
- `vox notify c --voice <name>` sets voice atomically
- All slash commands use Bash or MCP tools, zero file editing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(cli): use resolve_config_path() in status and vibe commands

All CLI commands now consistently use resolve_config_path() for
worktree-safe config resolution. Previously status_cmd used the
CWD-relative default while new commands used the git-root path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: route admin property queries through server API for basic admin access

All admin dashboard pages were querying properties via client-side Supabase
(anon key), which respects RLS and prevented basic admins from seeing
properties. Now all property queries go through /api/admin/properties which
uses the service role key to bypass RLS, with country filtering applied
server-side.

- Add GET /api/admin/properties endpoint with status filtering and stats
- Update property-review, unified, mobile, and desktop dashboards to use API
- Allow basic admins to reassign properties (split from canManageStatus)
- Fix /api/admin/users to include 'owner' user_type for FSBO users

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix nil slices serializing as null in JSON API responses

All database repo list methods used `var result []Type` which stays
nil when no rows are returned. json.Marshal(nil) produces `null`,
crashing the React frontend when it tries to iterate (e.g. .reduce()
on null). Fixed by initializing with `result := []Type{}` so empty
results serialize as `[]`.

This was the root cause of the agents settings page crash.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: make scroll reveal observer reliable + add fallback

- Lower IntersectionObserver threshold from 0.15 to 0.01
- Change rootMargin from negative (-40px bottom) to positive (+80px)
  so elements trigger BEFORE entering viewport
- Add 2.5s fallback timeout that reveals any remaining hidden elements
- Add <noscript> CSS override so content is visible without JS

Root cause: the observer with threshold 0.15 and -40px rootMargin was
missing elements during normal scrolling, leaving 9 of 16 .reveal
and .reveal-headline elements permanently at opacity:0. This made
entire sections (Guide, Services cards, DiagnosticCTA, ClosingCTA)
invisible on the deployed site.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
ensemble extraction pipeline: AST + sentinels + adversarial re-extraction

- tree-sitter AST parsing (web-tree-sitter + tree-sitter-wasms)
- sentinel generation from classes, interfaces, types
- coverage metrics (sentinel vs graph comparison)
- adversarial re-extraction when LLM misses AST-discovered symbols
- /calabi/extract-ast handler + 6 tc tests (334 total, 0 failures)
- ingest pipeline wired: AST → LLM → adversarial → merge → coverage
- strip agent nesting env vars (CLAUDECODE etc) from LLM child processes

- mounts/velcro_strap.scad: L-shaped mount with horizontal base and vertical arm with velcro channel
